{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-33748", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-59", "name": "Improper Link Resolution Before File Access ('Link Following')"}], "description": "### Impact
Insufficient validation of Git URL fragment subdir components (`<url>#<ref>:<subdir>`, [docs](https://docs.docker.com/build/concepts/context/#url-fragments)) may allow access to files outside the checked-out Git repository root. Possible access is limited to files on the same mounted filesystem.

### Patches
The issue has been fixed in version v0.28.1

### Workarounds
The issue affects only builds that use Git URLs with a subpath component. Avoid building Dockerfiles from untrusted sources or using the subdir component from an untrusted Git repository where the subdir component could point to a symlink.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00463, "percentile": 0.36562}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4vrq-3vrq-g6gg", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-26T18:27:49Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4vrq-3vrq-g6gg", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4vrq-3vrq-g6gg"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-33748"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-27T15:16:57Z", "published_at": "2026-03-26T18:27:49Z", "references": ["https://github.com/moby/buildkit/security/advisories/GHSA-4vrq-3vrq-g6gg", "https://docs.docker.com/build/concepts/context/#url-fragments", "https://github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/v0.28.1", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33748", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4vrq-3vrq-g6gg"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/moby/buildkit/security-advisories/GHSA-4vrq-3vrq-g6gg", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/moby/buildkit", "summary": "BuildKit Git URL subdir component can cause access to restricted files", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T20:58:23Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-4vrq-3vrq-g6gg", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.28.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/moby/buildkit"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.28.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: BuildKit Git URL subdir component can cause access to restricted files
